name: BBS Barber & Salon Supply
tagline: Everything a barber or stylist needs — clippers, cosmetology products, and on-site clipper repair.

address.street: 202 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Ste B
address.full: 202 E Martin Luther King Jr Blvd, Ste B, Los Angeles, CA 90011

about: For over 25 years, BBS Barber & Salon Supply has been the go-to destination for barbers, cosmetologists, and stylists across Los Angeles. We carry the brands professionals trust — Wahl, Andis, Oster, BabylissPRO, and more — plus on-site clipper and trimmer repair you won't find at big-box stores.
